signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.passwordRecovered: Your password was changed. Sign in with your new password.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor code
twoFactor.authenticatorSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
twoFactor.recoverySubtitle: Enter one of the recovery codes saved when 2FA was enabled.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.confirmationHint: After signing up, enter the 6-digit code from your email.

confirmEmail.title: Confirm your email
confirmEmail.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it below.

errors.invalidCodeLength: Enter the 6-digit code from your email.

success.codeResent: A new code has been sent to your email.

request.title: Account recovery
request.subtitle: Choose a recovery method that was linked to your account beforehand.

message.requestAccepted: If an eligible account exists, a recovery link has been sent to its email address.

invalid.title: Invalid link
invalid.subtitle: Request a new link or use a linked Telegram account.

telegram.description: Use the Telegram account that was linked before you lost access.

confirmationCode.description: Compare this code with the one in the bot message

error.notLinked: This Telegram account is not linked to an Authora account.
error.expired: The recovery link expired. Start the process again.
error.botNotConfigured: Telegram bot is not configured on the server.

popup.openingDescription: Please wait while Authora creates a secure login link.

error.botNotConfigured: Telegram bot is not configured on the server.
error.linkExpired: Login link expired. Please try again.

instruction.pressStart: Press Start in the opened Telegram chat, then come back here.
instruction.manualFallback: If Telegram did not open, <link>open it here</link> or send <command>{{command}}</command> to the bot.

errors.exchangeFailed: Could not complete sign-in. Please try again.

setup.scanQr: Scan this QR code with Google Authenticator, Authy or another authenticator app:

recovery.title: Recovery codes
recovery.description: Save these one-time codes now. They will not be shown again after you leave this page.

error.copyFailed: Could not copy recovery codes. Select and save them manually.
